hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'should-i-bike/[^/]+\.py$'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "You just edited a CLI file. Check if the same change is needed in the PWA (docs/js/)."}}'; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'docs/js/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "You just edited a PWA file. Check if the same change is needed in the CLI (should-i-bike/*.py)."}}'; fi
